holdings.name: Apple Inc.
holdings.insight: Apple is advancing 0.8% today to $193.41, carrying a 27.2% unrealized gain versus a cost basis of $152.00. Services revenue momentum and the upcoming Vision Pro refresh maintain a Bullish stance despite broader macro headwinds.

holdings.name: Microsoft Corp.
holdings.insight: Microsoft is retreating 0.68% today to $415.22 but remains the portfolio's strongest position at a 47.2% unrealized gain from the $282.00 cost basis. Azure and Copilot integration tailwinds keep the long-term thesis Bullish.

holdings.name: Alphabet Inc.
holdings.insight: Alphabet is advancing 1.03% today to $171.88, supported by recovering Search ad revenue and Gemini AI adoption. The position holds a 45.7% gain vs $118.00 cost basis, warranting a Bullish outlook.

holdings.name: NVIDIA Corp.
holdings.insight: NVIDIA is surging 2.71% today to $878.36, extending a 114.1% unrealized gain from the $410.00 cost basis — the portfolio's star performer. Continued data-center GPU demand and Blackwell ramp make this Bullish with elevated valuation risk.

holdings.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
holdings.insight: JPMorgan is retreating 1.05% today to $222.14 amid yield-curve pressures, but the position holds a solid 32.2% gain from $168.00. Consumer banking resilience and investment-banking recovery support a Neutral-to-Bullish view.
